more updates needed to fix the ai ad description creating and testing. We need to add an extra input for additional ai user prompt instructions that will get sent with the request to to create the ai ad description. Additionally we are seeing the application trying multiple models for glm when we just want the one model glm-4.7. How about we also add a select in the account settings with the llm api key settings where we can choose the models to use. Additionally add the llm model selector in the ai templates along with the ai model and in the ai ad configuration page.
